languages.text: "Среди экспонатов его "музеона" я видел небывалые сокровища... артефакты, которые сделали бы меня самым могущественным Вольным Торговцем, которого знал Империум Человека... Но я просчитался, и был сам превращен в экспонат... Что произошло дальше, вы знаете сами". {n}Старик прикрывает глаз, и глубокие морщины пролегают на лоскутах уцелевшей кожи.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Среди экспонатов его "музеона" я видел небывалые сокровища... артефакты, которые сделали бы меня самым могущественным Вольным Торговцем, которого знал Империум Человека... Но я просчитался, и был сам превращен в экспонат... Что произошло дальше, вы знаете сами". {n}Старик прикрывает глаз, и глубокие морщины пролегают на лоскутах уцелевшей кожи.{/n}

languages.text: "Among the exhibits in his 'Museion,' I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium. But I misjudged and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Среди экспонатов его "музеона" я видел небывалые сокровища... артефакты, которые сделали бы меня самым могущественным Вольным Торговцем, которого знал Империум Человека... Но я просчитался, и был сам превращен в экспонат... Что произошло дальше, вы знаете сами". {n}Старик прикрывает глаз, и глубокие морщины пролегают на лоскутах уцелевшей кожи.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Among the exhibits of his 'museon', I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium of Man. But I miscalculated and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}

"Among the exhibits of his 'museon', I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium of Man. But I miscalculated and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}

But I misjudged and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}

"Among the exhibits in his 'museion', I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium. But I misjudged and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}

languages.text: "Unter den Exponaten seines 'Museions' sah ich beispiellose Schätze ... Artefakte, die mich zum mächtigsten Freihändler des Imperiums gemacht hätten. Aber ich verschätzte mich und wurde selbst zum Exponat ... Was als Nächstes passierte, wisst Ihr selbst." {n}Als der alte Mann sein Auge schließt, bilden sich auf seiner verbliebenen Haut tiefe Furchen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Among the exhibits in his 'Museion,' I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium. But I misjudged and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Unter den Exponaten seines 'Museions' sah ich beispiellose Schätze ... Artefakte, die mich zum mächtigsten Freihändler des Imperiums gemacht hätten. Aber ich verschätzte mich und wurde selbst zum Exponat ... Was als Nächstes passierte, wisst Ihr selbst." {n}Als der alte Mann sein Auge schließt, bilden sich auf seiner verbliebenen Haut tiefe Furchen.{/n}

languages.text: « Parmi les œuvres exposées dans son Muséion, j'ai tout de suite remarqué de véritables trésors... Des artefacts qui auraient fait de moi le libre-marchand le plus puissant de tout l'Imperium. Mais je me suis mépris, et c'est moi qui me suis retrouvé exposé... Quant à la suite, vous la connaissez. » {n}Le vieil homme ferme son œil, et des rides profondes se creusent sur le peu de peau qu'il lui reste.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Among the exhibits in his 'Museion,' I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium. But I misjudged and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Parmi les œuvres exposées dans son Muséion, j'ai tout de suite remarqué de véritables trésors... Des artefacts qui auraient fait de moi le libre-marchand le plus puissant de tout l'Imperium. Mais je me suis mépris, et c'est moi qui me suis retrouvé exposé... Quant à la suite, vous la connaissez. » {n}Le vieil homme ferme son œil, et des rides profondes se creusent sur le peu de peau qu'il lui reste.{/n}

languages.text: «Entre las exposiciones de su "museion", vi tesoros sin par... artefactos que me habrían convertido en el Comerciante Independiente más poderoso del Imperium. Pero cometí un error y acabé convertido en otra pieza más... Usted sabe tan bien como yo lo que sucedió a continuación». {n}El anciano cierra un ojo y las arrugas cubren la piel que le queda.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Among the exhibits in his 'Museion,' I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium. But I misjudged and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Entre las exposiciones de su "museion", vi tesoros sin par... artefactos que me habrían convertido en el Comerciante Independiente más poderoso del Imperium. Pero cometí un error y acabé convertido en otra pieza más... Usted sabe tan bien como yo lo que sucedió a continuación». {n}El anciano cierra un ojo y las arrugas cubren la piel que le queda.{/n}

languages.text: "Museion'daki sergiler arasında benzersiz hazineler gördüm... Beni İmparatorluk'un tanıdığı en güçlü Hür Tacir yapacak eserler. Ancak yanıldım, kendim bir sergiye dönüştüm... Sonra olanları zaten biliyorsun." {n}İhtiyar gözünü kapatıyor, yüzünde kalan deride derin kırışıklıklar oluşuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Among the exhibits in his 'Museion,' I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium. But I misjudged and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Museion'daki sergiler arasında benzersiz hazineler gördüm... Beni İmparatorluk'un tanıdığı en güçlü Hür Tacir yapacak eserler. Ancak yanıldım, kendim bir sergiye dönüştüm... Sonra olanları zaten biliyorsun." {n}İhtiyar gözünü kapatıyor, yüzünde kalan deride derin kırışıklıklar oluşuyor.{/n}

languages.text: “在他那座‘陈列馆’的展品中，我见过无与伦比的宝藏……那些造物足以让我成为帝国有史以来最强大的行商浪人。但我失算了，反倒变成了一件展品……之后的事，你也都知道了。”{n}老人合上眼睛，残存的皮肤上布满深深的沟壑。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Among the exhibits in his 'Museion,' I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium. But I misjudged and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “在他那座‘陈列馆’的展品中，我见过无与伦比的宝藏……那些造物足以让我成为帝国有史以来最强大的行商浪人。但我失算了，反倒变成了一件展品……之后的事，你也都知道了。”{n}老人合上眼睛，残存的皮肤上布满深深的沟壑。{/n}

languages.text: 「私の『ミュージオン』の展示品の中には、かつてないほどの宝物があった...帝国で最も強力なローグ・トレーダーになるであろうような遺物だった。だが私は判断を誤り、自分も展示品にされてしまった...その後何が起こったかは、あなたも知っているだろう。」{n}老人は目を閉じ、残った皮膚の跡に深い皺が刻まれる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Among the exhibits in his 'Museion,' I saw unparalleled treasures... artefacts that would have made me the most powerful Rogue Trader known to the Imperium. But I misjudged and was myself turned into an exhibit... What happened next, you know for yourself." {n}The old man closes his eye, deep furrows crossing the patches of remaining skin.{/n}
